news.t: BlackRock Expands iShares® iBonds ® ETF Franchise with TIPS ETF Suite
BlackRock launches series of TIPS ETFs as Fed battles inflation

overview.description: The iShares iBonds Oct 2029 Term TIPS ETF (IBIF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks a market value-weighted index of US Treasury inflation-protected securities maturing between January and October 2029. The fund will terminate in October 2029 IBIF was launched on Sep 19, 2023 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: BlackRock launches series of TIPS ETFs as Fed battles inflation
